semantic.role: Engine module for fast, LLM-free source code analysis that discovers module dependency graphs via regex-based extraction of imports and exports.
responsibilities: Walk the repository file tree to discover all supported source files.
Extract import and export statements using regex patterns per language.
Build a directed graph of nodes (modules) and edges (dependencies) with counts.
Provide a function to persist the quick-scan result as JSON to a designated directory.
Ensure the scan completes quickly (under 30 seconds) for repos up to 50k lines.
outOfScope: Any LLM-based analysis or semantic understanding.
AST parsing using full parsers (uses regex only).
Service-level orchestration or CLI command handling.
Multi-language support beyond a predefined set of extensions.
invariants: Engine Independence: This module must not import any CLI entrypoints or service-level orchestration modules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a fast, standalone analysis engine for generating quick module dependency overviews without relying on LLMs, enabling rapid feedback in CI or editor contexts.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor of legacy CLI aliases and rebuild of documentation; this quick-scan engine is part of the overall rebuilt analysis pipeline.

publicSurface.description: Performs a fast, regex-based scan of the repository rooted at the given directory and returns a QuickScanResult containing nodes (modules) and edges (dependencies).
Writes the given QuickScanResult as a JSON file to the .spine/view/data/ directory under the root, creating directories as needed.
Interface representing a single module node in the quick-scan graph, including its file path, language, and counts of exports and imports.
Interface representing a dependency edge from one module to another, storing source and target file paths.
Interface representing the complete quick-scan output, containing an array of nodes and edges, plus a timestamp of when the scan was performed.
